mapper.sql: id, semester_id, department_id, grade_level, standard_size, locked, calculation_method, locked_at, locked_by, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM class_size_standards WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} AND ( (department_id = #{departmentId} AND grade_level = #{gradeLevel}) OR (department_id = #{departmentId} AND grade_level IS NULL) OR (department_id IS NULL AND grade_level IS NULL) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN department_id IS NOT NULL AND grade_level IS NOT NULL THEN 1 WHEN department_id IS NOT NULL AND grade_level IS NULL THEN 2 WHEN department_id IS NULL AND grade_level IS NULL THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM class_size_standards WHERE semester_id = #{semesterId} ORDER BY department_id NULLS LAST, grade_level NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE class_size_standards SET locked = 1, locked_at = NOW(), locked_by = #{lockedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE class_size_standards SET locked = 0, locked_at = NULL, locked_by = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
